content:
# Ant Design - Overview

Page type: form
Use cases: enterprise form, advanced search, settings page, admin CRUD
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/form/

Visual traits:
- structured
- label-driven
- validation-ready
- enterprise

Use when:
- enterprise form
- advanced search
- settings page
- admin CRUD

Avoid when:
- one-field marketing capture
- native mobile settings

AI summary: Use Ant Design Form for enterprise React forms: controlled validation, label/grid layout, disabled states, scroll-to-first-error, and compact advanced-search layouts.

# Ant Design - Layout Rules

Page type: form
Use cases: enterprise form, advanced search, settings page, admin CRUD
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/form/

- Choose horizontal, vertical, or inline layout based on density and scanning needs.
- Use label alignment and grid columns consistently across a page.
- For advanced table search, use compact multi-column forms.

AI summary: Use Ant Design Form for enterprise React forms: controlled validation, label/grid layout, disabled states, scroll-to-first-error, and compact advanced-search layouts.

# Ant Design - Component Patterns

Page type: form
Use cases: enterprise form, advanced search, settings page, admin CRUD
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/form/

- form
- form item
- label
- required mark
- validation feedback
- initial values
- scroll to first error

AI summary: Use Ant Design Form for enterprise React forms: controlled validation, label/grid layout, disabled states, scroll-to-first-error, and compact advanced-search layouts.

# Ant Design - Interaction States

Page type: form
Use cases: enterprise form, advanced search, settings page, admin CRUD
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/form/

- validating
- error
- warning
- disabled
- reset
- submit

AI summary: Use Ant Design Form for enterprise React forms: controlled validation, label/grid layout, disabled states, scroll-to-first-error, and compact advanced-search layouts.

# Ant Design - Accessibility Notes

Page type: form
Use cases: enterprise form, advanced search, settings page, admin CRUD
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/form/

- Keep labels and validation messages attached to their fields.
- Use scroll-to-error behavior for long forms.

AI summary: Use Ant Design Form for enterprise React forms: controlled validation, label/grid layout, disabled states, scroll-to-first-error, and compact advanced-search layouts.

# Ant Design - Implementation Hints

Page type: form
Use cases: enterprise form, advanced search, settings page, admin CRUD
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://ant.design/components/form/

- Use for React admin forms where validation and layout control are important.
- Make required vs optional fields explicit at the form level.

AI summary: Use Ant Design Form for enterprise React forms: controlled validation, label/grid layout, disabled states, scroll-to-first-error, and compact advanced-search layouts.
